en: And believe me, if anybody can fix it, it's this guy. He's great. I appreciate that.
ko: 믿어줘, 고칠 수 있는 사람이 있다면 이 친구야. 정말 대단해.

en: Where are my manners? You want something to drink? That would be great.
I'm really craving ginger ale. Oh, we have ginger ale, right, Jeff? Do you?
I cannot stock up enough ginger ale. I love ginger ale.
ko: 진저 에일을 충분히 사둘 수가 없어.

en: Hey, how about I'll get in on the ginger ale. You sure you got enough?
ko: 그럼 내가 진저 에일 좀 가져올게. 충분히 있겠지?

en: Oh, no, we got tons of ginger ale. Thank you, Jeff. Thank you.
ko: 아, 아니, 진저 에일이 엄청 많아.

en: So do you know the sex of the child? We're going to have a little baby boy.
A little baby boy. How about that?
Have you thought about the skin color at all?
ko: 피부색에 대해 생각해본 적 있어? 뭐라고?

en: I'm sorry? You know, the tone. Would you prefer it's a little darker, I would imagine?
ko: 톤 말이야, 좀 더 어두운 게 좋겠어?

en: You might prefer it to be a little darker as opposed to lighter, no?
ko: 밝은 것보다 어두운 게 좋지, 그렇지?

en: Well, I mean, I've never even thought about it. But I guess, like, darker, I guess.
ko: 음, 그런 건 생각해본 적이 없어,

en: Yeah, I would think. What? Right? Yeah, that makes sense.
I... What? You prefer him to be darker? I prefer it.
ko: 너는 그가 더 어두운 게 좋다고? 나는 그렇게 생각해.

en: I mean, if someone's asking me if I had to choose, I'd say, let's go for it. Why are you choosing?
You probably like it a little lighter, maybe, no? No, I don't.
ko: 아마도 너는 좀 더 밝은 게 좋을 거야, 아닐까?

en: I don't think I want my baby to be lighter.
ko: 아니, 내 아기가 더 밝은 건 원하지 않아.

en: I haven't thought about that at all. I'm surprised that you've thought about it.
ko: 그런 건 전혀 생각해본 적 없어.
